title: Simple Auto Attack
description: Holding attack button autoswings your weapon
body:
# Simple Auto Attack

**Simple Auto Attack** autoswings your weapon when aiming at enemies — no clicking needed.

## Features

- **Auto-attacks when your weapon cooldown is ready** and you're aiming at a mob or player
- **Attack though obstructions** - grass, cobwebs, kelp, vines and plants
- **Prevents accidental block breaking** with swords, tridents, maces, etc. (fully configurable)
- **Fully configurable** via [ModMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)

## How to Use

1. Install [Fabric](https://fabricmc.net/use/), [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api), and [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
2. Place this mod in your Minecraft `mods` folder
3. Launch the game and use the default **comma (`,`) key** to toggle

Configuration is available in-game via ModMenu.

## ⚠️ Multiplayer Warning ⚠️

This mod may not be allowed on multiplayer servers and could trigger anti-cheat.  
Always check and respect server rules. Use at your own risk.

## Credits

Inspired by [AutoAttack by vin35](https://modrinth.com/mod/autoattack)
